name: Zellco
description_short: Zellco Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution chartered in 1936, serving Washington Parish and surrounding Louisiana counties with loans, savings accounts, and digital banking services.
description_long:
Zellco Federal Credit Union was originally chartered in 1936 as the Bogalusa Paper Company Federal Credit Union to serve employees and their families. The institution was renamed Zellco FCU when Crown Zellerbach Corporation acquired the paper company. In 1983, Zellco obtained a community charter, expanding membership eligibility to anyone living or working in Washington Parish. By 2003, the credit union further expanded into Pearl River, Marion, and rural St. Tammany Parish Counties to include anyone who lives, works, or worships in those areas. This growth trajectory reflects a deliberate strategy to serve an increasingly broad membership base across Louisiana.

Zellco offers a comprehensive suite of financial products centered on lending and savings. Primary loan products include auto loans (as low as 5.49% APR), real estate/home loans (as low as 5.25% APR), recreational vehicle loans (as low as 6.49% APR), and unsecured personal loans (as low as 9.74% APR). On the savings side, members can open share accounts and share draft accounts, and apply for Debit MasterCards. Digital banking services include online account access, mobile apps for iOS and Android, and an automated Audio Response System available 24/7 via phone at 1-833-990-0239. The credit union also provides financial calculators, loan calculators, and tools like NADA guides and CarFax access to support member decision-making.

Zellco distinguishes itself through member-centric services and payroll integration features. The credit union offers direct deposit and payroll deduction options, allowing members to have paychecks automatically distributed across accounts or applied to loan payments. Wire transfer services are available at reasonable fees. The institution emphasizes personal service and the "Credit Union Difference," positioning itself as fundamentally different from traditional banks by operating as a member-owned cooperative. Their tagline "Experience the Credit Union Difference" underscores this philosophy of fast, friendly, personalized service rather than transactional banking.

Zellco is a legitimate, NCUA-insured credit union with nearly 90 years of operational history and regulatory standing. However, the website provides limited transparency on membership fees, account minimums, or specific terms. The institution's geographic focus on Louisiana parishes may limit accessibility for out-of-state consumers. Loan rates listed are "as low as" figures, meaning actual rates depend on creditworthiness and other underwriting factors. For Louisiana residents in the service areas seeking community-oriented lending with competitive rates and integrated payroll services, Zellco represents a viable alternative to traditional banks.
services: Real estate/home loans (as low as 5.25% APR)
Recreational vehicle loans (as low as 6.49% APR)
Unsecured personal loans (as low as 9.74% APR)
Payroll deduction for automatic savings and loan payments
24/7 Audio Response System for account access
Online account access and digital banking
Wire transfer services at reasonable fees
Member insurance and identity theft protection
pros: NCUA-insured member-owned credit union with 88+ years of operational history (chartered 1936)
Competitive loan rates: auto loans from 5.49% APR, real estate from 5.25% APR, unsecured from 9.74% APR
Payroll deduction integration allows automatic loan payments and savings deposits directly from paychecks
24/7 automated Audio Response System (1-833-990-0239) for account access without branch hours
Digital banking across multiple platforms: online portal, iOS app, Android app, and mobile accessibility
Direct deposit services with flexible distribution across multiple accounts or loan payments
Wire transfer services available at reasonable fees for domestic bank transfers
cons: Geographic restriction: only serves Louisiana residents in Washington Parish, Pearl River, Marion, and St. Tammany Parish areas
Limited transparency on membership fees, minimum account balances, or specific loan terms on website
Advertised rates are 'as low as' figures with no details on qualification criteria or what rates typical members receive
Website mentions system upgrades (June 30-July 2) suggesting potential service interruptions
No information on credit card products, overdraft protection, or other consumer lending beyond listed categories
best_for: Louisiana employees in Washington Parish, Pearl River, Marion, or St. Tammany Parish seeking competitive auto loans with payroll deduction
Members prioritizing personal service and community-focused financial institutions over large national banks
Homebuyers in the service area looking for real estate financing with personalized underwriting
Savers seeking NCUA insurance protection and member-owned cooperative structure
diagnosis: Zellco FCU is best suited for Louisiana residents in Washington Parish, Pearl River, Marion, and St. Tammany Parish who value community-based lending and member ownership. The main caveat is strict geographic limitation—out-of-state or non-service-area residents are ineligible, and the website lacks detailed fee and rate transparency needed for comparing offerings against other local credit unions or banks.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
